chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2422 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For order on office objection No.18 2. For hearing of main case 07-04-2025 Syed Muhammad Abbas, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Javed Hussain, advocate holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent department.
